ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "lecture_tutorial_practical" TEXT /* Lecture, Tutorial, Practical hours */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits assigned to the course */,
  "exam_slot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam slot */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the course */,
  "corequisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_exam_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_slot_id") REFERENCES exam_slots ("exam_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_slots" (
  "exam_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam slot */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the slot (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the examination */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the examination */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the instructor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor mapping */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023, Spring 2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year for the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-offering mapping */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section number for the course offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program enrolled in by the student */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch year for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade points for the grade */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
